message:
feat(web): middleware module and request_region formatting cleanup

- Add web/middleware.rs (778 lines) providing HTTP middleware
  infrastructure for the async web layer.
- Register middleware sub-module in web/mod.rs.
- request_region.rs: formatting cleanup — flatten match arms, collapse
  single-expression closures, reformat long header insert chains.
  No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
